echo-desc: Sistéma di nutifikason di uzuáris sobri ivéntus i mensájis
echo-pref-email-frequency-never: Ka nvia-m nutifikasons pa kureiu iletróniku
echo-category-title-verify-email-reminde: Abizu pa kunfirmason di kureiu iletróniku
notification-header-thank-you-1-edit: {{GENDER:$2|Bu}} kaba di fasi {{GENDER:$2|bu}} purmeru idison; obrigadu, i ben-bindu!
notification-header-thank-you-10-edit: {{GENDER:$2|Bu}} kaba di fasi {{GENDER:$2|bu}} désimu idison; obrigadu i, di smóla, kuntinua!
notification-header-thank-you-100-edit: {{GENDER:$2|Bu}} kaba di fasi {{GENDER:$2|bu}} sentésimu idison; mutu obrigadu!
notification-header-thank-you-1000-edit: {{GENDER:$2|Bu}} kaba di fasi {{GENDER:$2|bu}} milésimu idison; obrigadu pa es inórmi kulaburason!
notification-header-thank-you-10000-edit: {{GENDER:$2|Bu}} kaba di fasi {{GENDER:$2|bu}} désimu milésimu idison; nu ta gardise-bu na divéra!
notification-header-thank-you-100000-edi: {{GENDER:$2|Bu}} kaba di fasi {{GENDER:$2|bu}} sentésimu milésimu idison; nu ta gardise-bu pa bus nkrívi kuntributu!
notification-header-thank-you-1000000-ed: {{GENDER:$2|Bu}} kaba di fasi {{GENDER:$2|bu}} milionésimu idison; nu ta gardise-bu pa es didikason fabulozu!
notification-header-thank-you-10000000-e: {{GENDER:$2|Bu}} kaba di fasi {{GENDER:$2|bu}} désimu milionésimu idison; nu ka tene palabras pa gardise-bu pa es didikason brilianti!
